summary.note: Post-fix verdicts after comprehensive QA. All FAIL blocks fixed. 38 blocks need screenshot regeneration (run blocks/regenerate-screenshots.sh).

fixes_applied.description: Converted 170 blocks from flat property format to props wrapper format.
Fixed 24 elements in 18 blocks where duplicate JSON 'type' key caused Input components to be parsed incorrectly.
Updated List renderer to accept plain string items.
Updated Field renderer to render child elements (Input) instead of creating internal input.
Replaced Carousel children pattern with Card+Grid for 5 blocks. Carousel renderer only supports props.slides, not children.
Changed Tabs from props.items to props.tabs with {id,label} format + children array for 3 blocks.
Restructured navbars from Navbar type to explicit Stack+Surface+Link layout to fix orphaned actions rendering.
Replaced invisible Modal/overlay types with Card equivalents for screenshot-friendly rendering.
Removed AspectRatio wrappers and added explicit height on Image elements.

systemic_issues.description: Carousel renderer only supports props.slides (text strings), not children elements. Workaround: use Card+Grid layout.
Tabs renderer uses props.tabs [{id,label}] not props.items. 3 blocks corrected.
Navbar actions prop referencing element IDs causes orphaned rendering. Fixed by using explicit layout.
Modal/Sheet/Drawer types render as hidden in static screenshots. Replaced with Card equivalents.
Chart components show 'No data' in screenshots. Expected for static rendering without data source.

navigation.notes: bottom-nav-01 uses BottomNav type (invisible overlay). All others pass after fixes.

features.notes: feature-bento-01 has uniform sizes (not true bento)

auth.notes: social-login-01 footer text bleeds outside card

dashboard.notes: chart-section-01 shows 'No data'. sidebar-layout-01 is full page.

forms.notes: Non-taxonomy duplicates flagged but render well

modals-overlays.notes: command-palette-01 and lightbox-01 invisible overlay types

landing.notes: Not in taxonomy but render well

data-display.notes: Not in taxonomy but render well

mobile.notes: app-shell-01 is full app shell, not a section
